name: Chinese Laundry Cafe's Feta and Garlic Pate
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp chopped chives - OR - green onions
A pinch of freshly ground pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor until very smooth and creamy.
2. Spread on crackers, bread, or bagels.
3. Also terrific in sandwiches.
